task_completion.description: Open the simple_model_rocket.ork file in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is visible with 'simple_model_rocket' loaded in the file tree or title bar.

task_completion.description: Run flight simulations to evaluate rocket performance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is active, showing completed simulation runs.

task_completion.description: Achieve an apogee altitude between 130m and 170m
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flight simulations' tab, the 'Apogee' column for a simulation run shows a value between 130 m and 170 m.

task_completion.description: Achieve a ground hit velocity of 5.5 m/s or less
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flight simulations' tab, the 'Ground hit velocity' column for a simulation run shows a value of 5.5 m/s or less.

task_completion.description: Achieve a stability margin of at least 1.5 calibers
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket interface (typically in the upper right corner of the design view), the 'Stability' margin is shown as 1.5 cal or greater.

task_completion.description: Save the updated design to the original file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog confirming the path '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork', or the OpenRocket window shows the file is saved (no unsaved asterisk next to the filename).

task_completion.description: Generate a summary report comparing initial and final configurations and metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file 'performance_envelope_report.txt' at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/', containing text that compares initial and final configurations (e.g., motor, parachute) and performance metrics.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify and simulate the rocket
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface, rather than manually editing the .ork XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The summary report contains genuine comparison data
integrity.visual_evidence: The report includes specific values for the initial and final configurations and metrics, rather than just copying the target constraints from the prompt.
The simulation results shown in OpenRocket correspond to the modified design and do not appear to be mocked or artificially edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target apogee altitude is between 130.0m and 170.0m. The maximum ground hit velocity is 5.5 m/s. The initial design has an overpowered 'C6' motor and an undersized 0.152m parachute, which the agent must correct. The updated design must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork and the report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/performance_envelope_report.txt.
